title: psydrax calcicola
intro: Psydrax calcicola, also known as the bushy Psydrax, is a plant species native to Africa that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psydrax calcicola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
